word: G1824 - ἐξαυτῆς - exautēs - ex-ow'-tace - By and by

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: By and by
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1537 and the genitive singular feminine of G846 (G5610 being understood); from that hour, that is, instantly: - by and by, immediately, presently, straightway.
